- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- Summary: Created and maintained this file at .github/copilot-instructions.md.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- Summary: Project confirmed as Next.js app with TypeScript and npm.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
- Summary: Automated scaffold with create-next-app failed due uppercase folder naming restriction. Completed equivalent in-place scaffold manually in the current directory with a lowercase package name.

- [x] Customize the Project
- Summary: Kept customization minimal for a Hello World baseline and ensured App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, and ESLint are configured.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
- Summary: No required extensions were specified by project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
- Summary: Dependencies installed, lint passes, and production build succeeds.

- [x] Create and Run Task
- Summary: Created and started VS Code task "Run Next.js Dev Server" using npm run dev.

- [x] Launch the Project
- Summary: Debug launch confirmed and started via VS Code command.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
- Summary: README.md exists and reflects current project scripts and setup. This file has been cleaned to remove HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
